---
title: "About Me"
---

I am a biostatistics researcher interested in
healthcare analytics, epidemiology, and predictive modeling.

My work focuses on applying statistical and machine learning methods
to improve healthcare outcomes and public health decision-making.

## Research Interests

- Healthcare Data Science
- Epidemiology
- Machine Learning
- Statistical Modeling
- Public Health Analytics

## Career Goals

I aim to contribute to impactful healthcare research by combining
statistics, machine learning, and real-world data analysis.
